skill.name: video-generation-skill
skill.description: Create video concepts, scripts, shot lists, transitions, editing notes, and platform guidance for AI-assisted marketing video production.
skill.summary: Plan AI-assisted marketing videos with scripts, scenes, overlays, thumbnails, and platform-specific production notes.
skill.author: CleanExpo

security_audit.summary: Static findings for Ruby or shell backtick execution are false positives from Markdown inline code at SKILL.md line 72. Static weak cryptography findings at SKILL.md lines 3 and 52 are false positives from ordinary text, not cryptographic functions. The only residual concern is filesystem access through the declared Write tool.

low_findings.title: Filesystem Write Permission Declared
low_findings.description: The skill declares the Write tool in its front matter. This is a normal capability for producing video planning artifacts, but it can modify files if the host allows it.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The allowed-tools field directly lists Write. The skill content does not show destructive file behavior or unauthorized data access.

low_findings.title: Static External Command Finding Dismissed
low_findings.description: The reported backtick execution at SKILL.md line 72 is Markdown inline code for a database table and asset type. No shell command, Ruby execution, or user input execution is present.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The line contains inline documentation text only. There is no executable script block or command invocation context.

low_findings.title: Static Weak Cryptography Findings Dismissed
low_findings.description: The reported weak cryptography findings at SKILL.md lines 3 and 52 are ordinary prose. They do not reference cryptographic algorithms, keys, hashes, or encryption operations.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Both lines are descriptive Markdown content. The matches appear to be substring or token false positives rather than security-relevant code.

content.user_title: Create Video Plans for AI Production
content.value_statement: Marketing teams often have ideas but lack production-ready scripts and shot plans. This skill turns goals into structured video concepts for Claude, Codex, Claude Code, and AI video workflows.
actual_capabilities: Creates hooks, outlines, scripts, and calls to action for short-form and long-form videos.
Builds scene-by-scene breakdowns with B-roll ideas, overlay text, and transition notes.
Adapts video plans for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, LinkedIn, and website embeds.
Suggests thumbnail concepts and concise thumbnail text.
Prepares prompt-ready planning notes for external AI video tools.
Stores video concepts as documented social asset records when connected to the host workflow.
limitations: It does not generate video files directly.
It depends on external tools for rendering, editing, and publishing.
It does not verify current platform algorithm changes or trending sounds.
It requires clear brand, audience, and offer details for best results.

use_cases.title: Launch a Product Video
use_cases.description: Turn a product benefit into a short script, scene plan, and thumbnail direction for launch channels.

use_cases.title: Plan Social Video Batches
use_cases.description: Create repeatable short-form concepts for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and Facebook Reels.

use_cases.title: Prepare AI Video Prompts
use_cases.description: Convert a campaign idea into structured prompts and editing notes for external AI video generation tools.

prompt_templates.title: Create a Short Video Concept
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 30 second vertical video plan for [product] aimed at [audience]. Include the hook, script outline, B-roll, overlay text, and CTA.

prompt_templates.title: Adapt One Idea Across Platforms
prompt_templates.prompt: Adapt this campaign idea for TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, and LinkedIn. Keep the same message but adjust pacing, tone, format, and CTA for each platform.

prompt_templates.title: Build a Long-Form Video Outline
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a 6 minute YouTube video plan for [topic]. Include opening hook, section timing, talking points, visual suggestions, retention moments, summary, CTA, title, and thumbnail text.

prompt_templates.title: Create AI Video Production Notes
prompt_templates.prompt: Turn this marketing brief into production-ready notes for an AI video pipeline. Include scene prompts, motion direction, transitions, captions, brand constraints, and editor handoff notes.

output_examples.input: A 45 second Instagram Reel for a new appointment scheduling app.
output: Hook: Show the pain of missed bookings in the first three seconds.
Scenes: Problem screen, quick setup, calendar view, confirmation message, customer result.
Overlay text: Stop losing appointments, book faster, confirm instantly.
CTA: Try the scheduling flow today.

output_examples.input: A 5 minute YouTube video for a B2B analytics dashboard.
output: Opening: Start with a decision maker asking why revenue changed this week.
Main sections: data import, dashboard walkthrough, alert workflow, team handoff, results summary.
Visual notes: Use screen captures, simple callouts, and muted branded overlays.

best_practices: Provide the audience, offer, channel, video length, and desired action before requesting a plan.
Ask for platform-specific versions when one concept must run across several channels.
Review generated scripts for brand voice, factual accuracy, and legal claims before production.
anti_patterns: Do not ask for a final video file from this skill alone.
Do not publish claims, testimonials, or performance numbers without independent verification.
Do not use one script unchanged across every platform and format.

faq.question: Does this skill generate finished videos?
faq.answer: No. It creates concepts, scripts, shot lists, and production notes for use with external video tools.

faq.question: Which platforms does it support?
faq.answer: It includes guidance for TikTok, Instagram, YouTube, Facebook Reels, LinkedIn, and website video embeds.

faq.question: Can it help with AI video prompts?
faq.answer: Yes. It can convert a campaign brief into scene prompts and editing notes for AI video generation workflows.

faq.question: What information should I provide?
faq.answer: Provide the audience, product, message, channel, length, brand tone, and desired call to action.

faq.question: Can it create thumbnail ideas?
faq.answer: Yes. It can suggest thumbnail concepts and short thumbnail text for video distribution.

faq.question: Is it safe to publish?
faq.answer: Yes, with low risk. The skill has filesystem Write permission, but no confirmed malicious behavior was found.
